\n <p>Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một <:
We are looking for a Senior Fullstack Engineer who is passionate about technology to join the core product development team. You will play a key role in designing and building large-scale systems, serving millions of users.

Main responsibilities:

  • Design, develop and maintain frontend features using React.js and backend using Node.js.
  • Analyze system requirements, propose optimal and scalable software architecture solutions.
  • Review code, provide technical guidance and direction for Junior/Mid-level members of the team.
  • Work closely with Product Manager and QA to ensure the best product quality before release.
\n <p>Để thành công ở vị trí này, b:
To be successful in this position, you need:

  • At least 4 years of experience working as a Fullstack Developer.
  • Proficient in Javascript/Typescript, React.js, Node.js (Express/NestJS).
  • Experience working with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis).
  • In-depth understanding of RESTful API, GraphQL and Microservices architecture.
  • Having experience deploying applications on the Cloud platform (AWS/GCP), using Docker/Kubernetes is a huge advantage.
  • Excellent problem solving skills, good communication and teamwork skills.
\n <p><strong>Chính sách đãi ngộ:</:
Compensation policy:

  • Attractive salary from $2500 - $4000, negotiable based on ability.
  • 13th month salary + Quarterly project performance bonus (up to 2 months salary/year).
  • Review salary increase 2 times/year based on ability and contribution.
  • Comprehensive health insurance package (Bao Viet Healthcare) for employees and relatives.
  • The latest Macbook Pro M2/M3 and a separate screen are available for work.
  • Flexible working environment (Hybrid works from home 2 days/week), no strict clothing requirements.
  • Annual company trip to a 5-star resort, exciting monthly teambuilding activities.
\n <p>FinTech Asia đang tìm kiếm mộ:
FinTech Asia is looking for a talented Product Marketing Manager to lead product launch strategy and brand positioning in the Southeast Asian market.

Detailed description:

  • Research the market and analyze competitors to determine the unique selling point (USP) of the product.
  • Plan and execute GTM (Go-To-Market) strategy for new features and products.
  • Build communication messages, sales documents (sales kit, pitch deck, case studies) in coordination with the Design and Content team.
  • Work closely with Product, Sales and Customer Success teams to ensure consistent product messaging across every touchpoint.
\n <p><strong>Yêu cầu ứng viên:</st:
Candidate requirements:

  • From 3-5 years of experience in Marketing, including at least 2 years in Product Marketing for B2B/SaaS or FinTech companies.
  • Excellent storytelling skills and data analysis thinking.
  • Proficient in English (IELTS 6.5 or higher), able to write and communicate fluently with international partners.
  • Sensitive to the financial market and technology, always updated with new trends.
  • Have an independent working mindset and can withstand high pressure in a fast-paced startup environment.
\n <p><strong>Phúc lợi dành cho bạn:
Benefits for you:

  • Competitive income from 40,000,000 - 60,000,000 VND/month + Business bonus.
  • Provided with abundant budget to implement breakthrough marketing campaigns.
  • Participate in professional development training courses sponsored by the company.
  • Premium health insurance, annual health check.
  • Flexible working hours, focusing on efficiency and results instead of clock hours.
\n <p>Trở thành thành viên chủ chốt:
Become a key member of the Data Data Engineer team at a leading e-commerce corporation, processing Terabytes of data every day.

Your job:

  • Design, build, and optimize Data Pipelines (ETL/ELT) using Python, Spark, and Airflow.
  • Manage and develop modern Data Warehouse on Snowflake and AWS (S3, Redshift, Glue) platforms.
  • Collaborate with Data Scientists and Data Analysts to prepare data for Machine Learning models and reporting Dashboards.
  • Ensure security, integrity and data quality throughout the system.
\n <p><strong>Bạn cần đáp ứng:</str:
You need to meet:

  • Graduated from University in IT, Mathematics or related fields.
  • Minimum 3 years of practical experience as a Data Engineer.
  • Proficient in Python and Advanced SQL programming.
  • Deep experience with at least one Cloud ecosystem (AWS preferred) and workflow management tools (Airflow/Luigi).
  • Practical experience with Snowflake or Databricks is a big plus.
  • Good English communication skills to work directly with engineering teams in Europe and the US.
\n <p><strong>Lợi ích khi gia nhập::
Benefits of joining:

  • Salary ranges from $2000 - $3500 depending on ability assessed through test.
  • Signing bonus (1 month salary) for candidates who accept jobs this month.
  • Relocation package of 20 million VND for candidates from other provinces and cities coming to Da Nang to work.
  • 100% international environment, opportunity to exchange and learn with leading data experts.
  • Premium insurance for yourself and your family, 15 days of leave/year.
\n <p>Chúng tôi cần tìm một nhà lãn:
We need to find a strategic leader to shape the future of the human resources team at NextGen Logistics, helping the company expand from 500 to 1,000 employees in the next year.

Main mission:

  • Build and implement an overall recruitment strategy, position a strong employer brand in the market.
  • Manage, train and develop a high-performance TA team (about 10-15 people).
  • Optimize recruitment funnel, improve application process to enhance candidate experience (Candidate Experience).
  • Build a strong network with Universities, recruitment partners and professional communities.
  • Report directly to CHRO and advise on long-term human resources strategy to the Board of Directors.
\n <p><strong>Yêu cầu công việc:</s:
Job requirements:

  • Have a minimum of 7 years of experience in the Recruitment field, including at least 3 years in a senior management position (TA Manager / Head of TA).
  • There is a track record proving the ability to scale up the organization successfully in large companies or technology startups.
  • Data-driven mindset, sensitive in using ATS system and analyzing recruitment indicators.
  • Excellent leadership, inspiration and change management skills.
  • Fluent English, professional demeanor and convincing communication.
\n <p><strong>Gói đãi ngộ siêu hấp:
Super attractive compensation package:

  • Competitive income: Fixed salary 60 - 100 million/month + KPIs bonus + Annual stock bonus (ESOP).
  • Car allowance and travel expenses.
  • Participate in senior leadership training courses at home and abroad.
  • Flexible working hours, respect for personal space.
  • Premium VIP health care regime exclusively for management level.
